name: skill-guard
description: Security guard for Claude Code. Intercepts claude plugin install and npx skills add. Checks Gen, Socket and Snyk risk scores. Blocks on High Risk. Audits full environment on demand. Actions: install, add, plugin, skill, security, risk, audit, scan, check, safe, verify. Triggers: before every installation command, when user asks are my skills safe, scan my environment, what did I install.
